summary: This loop turn expanded the hard-first property and strategy surface for scaled-ui sync/claim and crank desync/fee-retroactivity, but the current Crucible fixture still lacks Token-2022 scaled-ui mint-state modeling and direct earn-authority sync/claim_for actions.
impact: Current executable coverage is still strongest on admin, wrap-authority, and earn-manager lifecycle paths. The highest-value rebasing and claim-ordering invariants remain partially blocked from direct Crucible execution.
next_action: Model Token-2022 scaled-ui extension state in the fixture, then add sync/claim_for/claim_fees actions and invariant checks tied to indices, fees, and recipient routing.
promotion_gate: Do not treat the new scaled-ui sync/claim or crank desync hypotheses as executable honest-zero outcomes until they run through the intended substrate.
